system_warranty.name: Atlas Signature Select Roofing System Warranty
system_warranty.requirements: Atlas Pro Plus contractor + complete Atlas system: synthetic underlayment, WeatherMaster ice & water, ProCut starter, Pro Cut hip & ridge

_meta.insurance_discount_note: Class 4 impact-resistant shingles typically qualify the homeowner for an annual insurance premium discount (5–35% depending on carrier and state). Worth highlighting in the customer quote.
base_includes: Ice & water shield (Atlas WeatherMaster MB-Plus or MB-LT)
Starter strip (Atlas Pro Cut HD Starter)
StormMaster Shake Class 4 impact-resistant shingles (material + labor)
Hip & ridge cap (Atlas StormMaster Hip & Ridge)
Continuous ridge vent (Atlas X-25 or similar)
Dumpster rental + magnetic nail sweep cleanup
base_excludes: Roof decking replacement — billed separately at $110/sheet (allowance)

items.description: Tear off existing composition shingles (1 layer) — dump fees included
Atlas Summit 60 Pro Synthetic Underlayment — full coverage
Atlas WeatherMaster Ice & Water Barrier — eaves, valleys, penetrations
Aluminum drip edge, color-matched — eaves and rakes
Atlas Pro Cut HD Starter Shingles — eaves and rakes
Atlas StormMaster Shake Class 4 impact-resistant laminate shingles — installed. Lifetime warranty, 130 mph wind, 3M Scotchgard Lifetime algae. Includes waste.
items.notes: All-in billing line: $700/SQ × total roof area, waste included. Class 4 may qualify customer for insurance premium discount.

items.description: Atlas StormMaster Hip & Ridge Shingles — color-matched, Class 4 IR
Atlas X-25 Ridge Vent — continuous along main ridge
New aluminum step flashing at wall-to-roof intersections
Dumpster rental + magnetic nail sweep cleanup
Contractor 10-year workmanship warranty (15-yr if Atlas Pro Plus Signature Select)

add_ons.description: Sheathing replacement — 1/2" CDX plywood, per 4x8 sheet (32 SF)
add_ons.notes: Allowance — actual qty determined on tear-off.

add_ons.description: Tear off second (or additional) layer of composition shingles
add_ons.notes: Add per layer beyond single layer included.

add_ons.description: Tear off cedar shake / shingle roof
Switch shingle line to Atlas StormMaster Slate (slate-look profile, same Class 4 IR)
add_ons.notes: Additive — different aesthetic, same impact rating.

add_ons.description: Lead pipe flashing UPGRADE in lieu of neoprene
Chimney flashing kit — 4-side reglet counter + step + apron

add_ons.notes: Code-required per IRC R1003.20 if chimney >30" wide upslope.

warranty_disclosure: To activate the Atlas Signature Select Roofing System Warranty, the installing contractor must be Atlas Pro Plus credentialed AND install the full Atlas system bundled in this price: Summit 60 Pro underlayment, WeatherMaster ice & water, Pro Cut Starter, StormMaster Shake shingles, StormMaster Hip & Ridge, and Atlas ventilation. Class 4 impact-resistant shingles may qualify the homeowner for an insurance premium discount of 5–35% depending on carrier and state — customer should call their carrier with the Class 4 certificate Atlas provides.
